case_title: CARLOS BERNARDO CARBAJAL VS. DAVID BRUNO WOLFE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARBAJAL, CARLOS BERNARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLFE, DAVID BRUNO $6,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED FEB-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, DAVID BRUNO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,400.00 FILED BY CARBAJAL, CARLOS BERNARDO AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, DAVID BRUNO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CARLOS BERNARDO CARBAJAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVIS BRUNO WOLFE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFE, DAVID BRUNO
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CARBAJAL, CARLOS BERNARDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
